'''Volks''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] that was stationed on [[Eiattu 6]] under the command of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Leonia Tavira]]. Shortly before the liberation of Eiattu, he was sent to find the body of the Rebel [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], [[Nrin Vakil]]. He was unable to find the [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] in the swamps around Eiattu's capital [[City/Legends|city]], and the [[Gender/Legends|female]] Moff executed him for his failure. His death served as an example to the others under Tavira's command that failure would not be tolerated.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 16|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 16]] {{1stm}}
